Text.Page:
Thulsa was too cautious to leave the teleportal out in the open. Work with Jerad to find it.

Remember: no one else can know about this, elves or not.

Thulsa was a god, but he wasn't exactly a master of camouflage.

I can reactivate the teleportal that Thulsa used to visit Sirjuka Gallery, but I need to be inside Malachai's laboratory to do it.

I'll set up the teleportal, but beware: I have no idea what traps Thulsa placed on the other side.
The teleportal is ready. Prepare yourself to see elven civilization as it once was.

The teleportal to Sirjuka Gallery is active.

Go there and find out how Thulsa planned to divide the Core's power.
